title: rubus × divexus
intro: Rubus × divexus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the purple raspberry (Rubus idaeus). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant and anthocyanin content, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of Rubus × divexus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as acting as an antiviral and antibacterial agent. Rubus × divexus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or jam, making it a versatile herbal remedy that can be used in a variety of ways to promote overall health and well-being.
